name: Drew's Famous Onion Dill Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients (yeast, flour, baking soda, and salt) in a large bowl.
2. In another bowl, mix together the water, cottage cheese, sour cream, sugar, minced onions, dill seeds, and melted butter until well combined.
3. Pour the wet mixture into the bowl with the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
4. Grease the inner pan lightly with a little melted butter if desired.
5. Place the dough in the bread machine or mix on a medium speed setting.
6. Select white bread cycle and start the machine.
7. Once baked, remove from the pan and place on a wire rack to cool.
